source_name: NBA.com official public team pages; manual curation of 4-player tiny pilot roster
description: Curated real snapshot containing 30 NBA team identity metadata, non-official UI accent colors, and a 4-player/2-team tiny pilot player identity + roster membership dataset. Teams and tiny pilot only: no full rosters, no contracts, salaries, cap sheets, injuries, scouting, or logos.
limitations: Teams metadata, non-official UI accent visual metadata, and 4-player tiny pilot identity + roster membership only
Pilot covers exactly 2 teams (OKC, DEN) and 4 players; not a full roster
No contract, salary, cap, injury, scouting, or live data
Birthdate/height/weight intentionally null for pilot players
No team logos or visual assets
Not live data; does not reflect transactions after as_of_date
Do not use for trade/signing recommendations
